# Branch Template

Use this format:

```text
<type>/<issue-id>-<slug>
```

Allowed types:

- `feature`
- `fix`
- `chore`
- `docs`
- `refactor`

Examples:

```text
feature/42-codex-log-ui
fix/87-explicit-workspace-resolution
docs/103-github-templates
```

Checklist:

- [ ] Issue exists
- [ ] Branch scope matches the issue
- [ ] Slug is short and stable
